mapper.sql: id, article_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.article_id, f.user_id, f.created_at, f.updated_at, f.deleted_at, f.version FROM blog_article_favorite f INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = f.article_id AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article_favorite f INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = f.article_id AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT f.id, f.article_id, f.user_id, f.created_at, f.updated_at, f.deleted_at, f.version FROM blog_article_favorite f INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = f.article_id AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article_favorite f INNER JOIN blog_article a ON a.id = f.article_id AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 100) + 1 FROM blog_article_favorite WHERE id < 10000000000
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article_favorite (id, article_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article_favorite SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article_favorite (id, article_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deletedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE deleted_at = VALUES(deleted_at), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
